sections.paragraph: an unused root, i.q. Arab. نظم to bore, to string pearls on a thread; whence نَظْمُ a string of pearls, or, as I think preferable, i.q. Ch. זמם to muzzle; whence Syr. ܙܡܳܡܳܙ a nose-ring, and Eth. ዝማም፡ a ring, put through the nostrils of beasts which are to be tamed, i.q. חָח. Hence-
